player_notes.victor wembanyama: Exited Monday's game vs. PHI at halftime with a left rib contusion and did not return. Monitor availability and minutes restriction for next game.
player_notes.luka doncic: Still sidelined with injury; multiple reports indicate uncertainty on return timeline with playoffs approaching. Avoid all Doncic props until cleared.
player_notes.cade cunningham: Nearing a return to the court for the Pistons per Shams Charania. Watch for activation news; if he returns, affects rotation and props for current Pistons starters.
player_notes.stephen curry: Returned from injury Sunday, scoring 29 points in 26 minutes — minutes restriction in place. Props should be tempered until he's playing full minutes again.

game_notes.MEM vs DEN: Memphis allowed 51 points to Denver in a prior OT game; Jokic matchup favors high counting stats. Memphis is a weak defensive team this season.
game_notes.POR vs SAS: Wembanyama suffered a left rib contusion Monday and his status for this game is uncertain; if out, Castle and other Spurs see elevated usage.
